headline: Barclays Maintains Underweight on Enphase Energy, Lowers Price Target to $30
summary: Barclays  analyst Christine Cho   maintains Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH) with a Underweight and lowers the price target from $31 to $30.

headline: Enphase Energy to Hold 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on May 13, 2026
summary: FREMONT, Calif., May 05, 2026 --  Enphase Energy, Inc. , a global energy technology company, today announced that it will be holding its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on May 13, 2026 at 9:00...
